archetype: Dual-income family of 4 in Toronto, mid-40s parents, two kids

sample_questions.q: Should we buy a $300 stroller for Lily this month?
Are we on track for the Lisbon trip in August?
How much did our family spend on dining out last month vs the month before?
How much did Ben spend on gaming this quarter?
What did the Lisbon trip cost us total, broken down by category?
Should I cancel my GoodLife membership? We have not used it in two months.
If we cut dining out by half, how much would we save by December?
Can we afford a $5,000 patio renovation this summer without missing our home reno goal?
Which of our past large purchases did we actually use?
What is our biggest category of spending this quarter?
Was there anything unusual on the credit card this month?
How much did Sarah spend on her credit card last month?
Are we still on pace for the home reno fund by next June?
Can I afford an $80 gaming controller this month?
How much have I saved toward my bike upgrade?
How much did I spend on Steam this month?
